risk_description: User creating orders and billing can fabricate revenue.
User creating orders and deliveries can ship unauthorized goods.
User managing pricing and rebates can create favorable terms.
User creating and changing rebates can manipulate trade terms.
User creating vendors and running payments can pay fictitious vendors.
User entering invoices and running payments can create fraudulent payments.
User creating vendors and entering invoices can fabricate relationships.
User creating customers and posting payments can fabricate transactions.
User posting journals and controlling periods can post to closed periods.
User posting and reversing journals can manipulate records.
User creating POs and receiving goods can fabricate procurement.
User creating vendors and POs can set up fictitious supply chains.
User receiving goods and counting can conceal discrepancies.
User creating and confirming production can fabricate output.
User creating and approving inspections can bypass quality controls.
User maintaining records and running payroll can create ghost employees.
User creating users and roles can grant unlimited access.
User planning promotions and posting profitability can inflate results.
User changing pricing and creating orders can apply unauthorized discounts.
User creating deliveries and shipments can bypass shipping controls.
